The SIP formula I intend to use is $FV = P \times \frac{(1 + i)^n - 1}{i} \times (1 + i)$.

To reduce the file size of the premium PDF report while preserving the exact design, colors, and format, I will optimize the image capture and compression settings.

Specifically, I will:

3.  **Optimize Quality**: Set the JPEG quality to `0.8`, which offers a massive reduction in storage size with negligible impact on visual quality.
4.  **Enable PDF Compression**: Add the `'FAST'` compression flag to the `jsPDF` `addImage` method.
